chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 94 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.05.2025. Mr. Noor Muhammad Memon, Advocate for Respondents Nos.6&7. Mr. Shehriyar Imdad Awan, AAG. ********** On the last date of hearing counsel for petitioner was directed to place on record copy of Advertisement and final merit list on the basis of which the petitioner was appointed. For that purpose he sought time but today none present for the petitioner nor any intimation received which shows that that petitioner and his counsel have lost interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
